scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -n shared,server,web -c auto "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:all: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -n shared,server,web,mobile -c auto "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/mobile"
